summary: Completed RAG-02 from the OS completion execution plan. Implemented serialized, recoverable, hash-preconditioned source lineage publication with atomic snapshot/chunk/provenance/generation writes, rollback/reapply, tamper refusal, stale and changed-content reverification, claim/evidence hash bindings, full Wiki/Projects/accepted factual scanning, explicit knowledge roles across JSON/SQLite/dense/Context Pack surfaces, and current-vault migration. Current vault has 20 snapshots, 20 verified chunks, 20 provenance links, 20 generation receipts, and zero unsupported, dangling, stale, hash mismatch, or blocker findings. App commit e2d1832 and data commit e98484f were pushed to origin/main.
decisions: Publish source snapshot, bounded chunk, provenance, claim/evidence bindings, and immutable generation receipt as one serialized recoverable transaction.
Treat URL anchors, fetched snapshots, verified chunks, claim support, behavior guidance, project context, and operations evidence as distinct knowledge roles.
Invalidate support when source, artifact, or claim hashes drift; require explicit verification method/date and a 180-day maximum age.
Keep the global OS completion goal open; RAG-02/HG-05 is complete, while RAG-03 and later packages remain.
next_steps: Continue with RAG-03 explicit golden sets and independent answer evaluation.
Restart Codex before further live MCP proof so the running MCP process reloads app version 2.2.9 and index schema v6.
Address automatic GitHub push closure separately because the current installed integration has DINOBRAIN_AUTO_SYNC_PUSH=0.
